items.claim: Si Woo Co has a more well-refined MMA game than Jean-Paul Lebasani.
items.quote: I think Co has a more wellrefined MMA game right now.

items.claim: Si Woo Co is capable of hurting Jean-Paul Lebasani on the feet.
items.quote: I think co will potentially hurt Labaseni on the feet.

items.claim: Si Woo Co has a control-based grappling game that can shut down athletic prospects.
items.quote: I'm going to trust in Co's versatility, his patience, and his controlbased grappling game to beat John Paul.

items.claim: Jose Delgado has a significant height and reach advantage over Austin Bashi.
items.quote: five foot 11 versus 5 foot six, Austin Bashy is thick and pretty jacked, but more has the stature of a bantamweight versus Delgado who looks like he could be fighting in the lightweight division. 74 inch reach to 70 height and reach advantage for the striker

items.claim: Jose Delgado possesses solid takedown defense.
Austin Bashi has never been knocked out in his career.
items.quote: Bashie's pretty tough. He's never been knocked out.

items.claim: Austin Bashi is an undersized featherweight who has previously lost to bantamweights.
items.quote: I've always said he's an undersized featherweight and lost the decision there.

items.claim: Jose Delgado is a stylistic kryptonite for Austin Bashi.
items.quote: I think Delgado is a bit of a stylistic kryptonite.
